scripts.scrape: CGO_CPPFLAGS="-I$(brew --prefix leptonica 2>/dev/null)/include -I$(brew --prefix tesseract 2>/dev/null)/include" CGO_LDFLAGS="-L$(brew --prefix leptonica 2>/dev/null)/lib -L$(brew --prefix tesseract 2>/dev/null)/lib" go run ./cmd/scraper && echo 'Scraping done — data written to web/public/data/lunches.json'
